Uses of Class
com.irurueta.ar.epipolar.FundamentalMatrixComparator

  • Packages that use FundamentalMatrixComparator 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.ar.epipolar
    This package contains classes related to epipolar geometry, such as Fundamental or Essential matrices and matched points correctors.

    • Uses of FundamentalMatrixComparator in com.irurueta.ar.epipolar

      Subclasses of FundamentalMatrixComparator in com.irurueta.ar.epipolar 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AlgebraicFundamentalMatrixComparator
      Compares two fundamental matrices using a pure algebraic difference to determine how similar they are.
      class  EpipolarDistanceFundamentalMatrixComparator
      Compares two fundamental matrices by estimating average epipolar distances.
      Methods in com.irurueta.ar.epipolar with parameters of type FundamentalMatrixComparator 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void FundamentalMatrixComparatorListener.onCompareEnd​(FundamentalMatrixComparator comparator)
      Called when comparison finishes.
      void FundamentalMatrixComparatorListener.onCompareProgressChange​(FundamentalMatrixComparator comparator, float progress)
      Called when progress of comparison significantly changes.
      void FundamentalMatrixComparatorListener.onCompareStart​(FundamentalMatrixComparator comparator)
      Called when comparison starts.
